artifacts.name: agents-truth
artifacts.description: AI single source of truth: project identity, git workflow, tech stack, canonical status and role enums, core architecture rules, and anti-patterns

artifacts.name: workflow-and-business-rules
artifacts.description: Complete workflow lifecycle: all 22 canonical status transitions (including BANK_RETURNED, BANK_REJECTED, SUPPORT_RETURNED, FX_CONFIRMATION_PENDING), business rules per stage, role responsibilities, and simplified status mapping for Data Entry users

artifacts.name: system-architecture
artifacts.description: Overall system architecture: component diagram, infrastructure layout, service boundaries, and data flow between backend and frontend

artifacts.name: database-and-models
artifacts.description: Canonical database schema: table definitions, foreign keys, canonical status and role enum values, model relationships, and indexing strategy

artifacts.name: frontend-guide
artifacts.description: Frontend architecture: Nuxt 4 project structure, composable patterns, store conventions, RTL rules, role-aware UI rules, per-role UX authority (docs/user-view/), parity-evidence triplet rule, operational density composition, and component anti-patterns

artifacts.name: backend-guide
artifacts.description: Backend architecture: Laravel 11 service-oriented patterns, WorkflowService contract, security rules, audit logging requirements, and coding conventions

artifacts.name: api-reference
artifacts.description: Full API contract: all endpoints, HTTP methods, request/response shapes, permission matrix per role, error codes, and pagination conventions

artifacts.name: design-system
artifacts.description: Visual design system: color tokens, typography scale, spacing grid, component radius/sizing rules, RTL layout conventions, and status color semantics

artifacts.name: user-view-data-entry
artifacts.description: DATA_ENTRY role UX authority: operational posture, dashboard structure, KPI semantics, page interactions, banner variants, status presentation, density, micro-copy, RTL rules, and non-visibility enforcement

artifacts.name: user-view-bank-reviewer
artifacts.description: BANK_REVIEWER role UX authority: review queue structure, approval/return/reject action surfaces, self-review guard UI, downstream tracking visibility, and non-visibility rules

artifacts.name: user-view-bank-admin
artifacts.description: BANK_ADMIN role UX authority: bank-level KPI grid, monthly trend chart, staff management surface, role allowlist (DATA_ENTRY + BANK_REVIEWER only), and oversight-without-claim-authority posture

artifacts.name: user-view-swift-officer
artifacts.description: SWIFT_OFFICER role UX authority: focused upload-queue dashboard, two-pill document indicator, /requests/[id]/swift dedicated page with locked-data summary panel + 3-section form, disabled-with-specific-reason submit gate, and distraction-free density principle

artifacts.name: user-view-support-committee
artifacts.description: SUPPORT_COMMITTEE role UX authority: support claim lifecycle (15-min TTL, 60s heartbeat), claim-state row tinting (mine/others/unclaimed), claim error banners, dashboard claim KPIs, and review action panel

artifacts.name: user-view-executive-member
artifacts.description: EXECUTIVE_MEMBER role UX authority: voting queue dashboard, VotingPanel structure, vote masking rule (votes hidden until session closure), pending-vote banners, voted-confirmation banners, and forbidden-actions list (no close/finalize/tie-break/override)

artifacts.name: user-view-committee-director
artifacts.description: COMMITTEE_DIRECTOR role UX authority: composite action-required strip (ReadyToClose/TieBreak/FXReady), 4-KPI governance grid, Voting Lifecycle table with Director action columns, FX Queue table, extended VotingPanel (close/finalize/tie-break modal/override), and Director-exclusive تأكيد المصارفة tab with 3-step FX completion sequence

artifacts.name: user-view-cby-admin
artifacts.description: CBY_ADMIN role UX authority: 6-KPI governance strip, Workflow Pressure Map, Executive Voting Oversight (view-only, no controls), Bank Risk Intelligence table, Compliance & Audit Signals, Critical Events feed, Smart Summary Bar on /requests, and oversight-only posture (no operational claim authority)

artifacts.name: planning-epics
artifacts.description: Full epic and story breakdown: all planned features through Epic 12 (Role-Driven UX/UI Enhancement), acceptance criteria, and implementation scope for the entire Yemen Flow Hub platform

artifacts.name: project-context
artifacts.description: Project context document: stakeholder needs, constraints, goals, and technical decisions captured during planning
